touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Ethan Lopez at ClayConsulting. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's AI-powered sales automation platform.
next_steps: Follow up with second call attempt

touches.ai_summary: Brief connection with Ethan Lopez. Introduced AskElephant's capabilities for automating sales workflows. Ethan expressed initial interest in tools that could help with sales-to-CS handoff processes. Agreed to follow-up email with more details.

questions_asked.question: What specifically does your platform do for sales teams?
questions_asked.answer: We automate repetitive sales tasks and improve handoffs between sales and customer success teams using AI

next_steps: Send detailed email about sales-to-CS handoff capabilities

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent outlining AskElephant's sales-to-CS handoff automation features. Ethan responded positively, mentioning they're currently evaluating solutions and have looked at Fathom. Requested a discovery call to discuss their specific pain points with handoff processes.

questions_asked.question: How does your approach differ from Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on end-to-end workflow automation beyond just call recording, with deep CRM integration for handoff orchestration

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Ethan Lopez. Discussed ClayConsulting's current sales-to-CS handoff challenges—manual note-taking, incomplete context transfer, delays in onboarding. Ethan manages a team that would benefit from automation. Identified need for approximately 34 seats across sales and account management teams.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and communication tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs including Salesforce and HubSpot, plus Slack, email, and calendar systems

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling rapidly and our current manual process is breaking down—CS team is getting frustrated with incomplete handoffs

next_steps: Schedule deeper dive call to map current workflow
Share case study from similar PropTech company

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery call focused on mapping ClayConsulting's current workflow. Ethan walked through their sales process from initial contact through CS handoff. Identified key pain points around information loss and delays. Discussed involving Harper Perez (CRO) and other stakeholders in evaluation process.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Harper Perez our CRO will need to sign off, plus Cameron and Isabella from account management, and Priya who handles procurement

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI are your customers typically seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Customers typically see 40-60% reduction in handoff time and significantly improved CS team satisfaction within first quarter

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 2-4 weeks depending on customization needs and integration complexity

next_steps: Schedule product demo for next week

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Ethan Lopez and account management team (Cameron Shah, Isabella Hernandez). Walked through complete sales-to-CS handoff workflow automation, AI-powered call summarization, automated CRM updates, and handoff templates. Team engaged positively with questions about customization and integration specifics. Mentioned they're also evaluating Fathom but like AskElephant's broader automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the handoff templates for different deal types?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, templates are fully customizable and can be configured by deal size, product type, or any CRM field

questions_asked.question: How does the AI handle technical conversations in PropTech?
questions_asked.answer: The AI model is trained on industry-specific terminology and can be fine-tuned with your own vocabulary and common topics

questions_asked.question: What's the learning curve for our team?
questions_asked.answer: Most users are productive within first week, and we provide hands-on training and ongoing support during onboarding

objections: We're also looking at Fathom which has strong call recording features—what's your advantage there?

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Ethan and IT stakeholders. Reviewed security, data privacy, API capabilities, and integration architecture. Tested live integration with ClayConsulting's Salesforce instance. Team validated technical fit but raised questions about total cost versus Fathom's pricing.

questions_asked.question: Where is customer data stored and what are your SOC 2 compliance details?
questions_asked.answer: Data is encrypted at rest and in transit, stored in US-based AWS servers, and we maintain SOC 2 Type II certification

questions_asked.question: Can we do a pilot with a smaller group first?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure a phased rollout starting with a core team of 10-15 users

questions_asked.question: What's included in ongoing support and training?
questions_asked.answer: All plans include dedicated CSM, unlimited training sessions, and 24/7 technical support

objections: The price point seems higher than Fathom—we need to understand the value justification
next_steps: Present pricing options and ROI analysis
Schedule meeting with CRO Harper Perez

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Harper Perez (CRO) and Ethan Lopez. Presented business case focused on revenue impact of faster, more accurate handoffs. Harper engaged positively on strategic value but noted budget constraints and need to be price-competitive. Discussed timeline for Q2 rollout aligned with ClayConsulting's scaling plans.

questions_asked.question: What does your premium tier include that justifies the investment over basic automation tools?
questions_asked.answer: Premium tier includes consulting hours for workflow optimization, advanced analytics, and custom integrations—essential for complex handoff scenarios

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline and budget approval process?
questions_asked.answer: Need to finalize by end of quarter. Priya from procurement will need to review final terms and pricing

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing options
Schedule pricing discussion with procurement and Ethan

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Cameron Shah and procurement team. Discussed proposal for 34 seats on automations_plus_consulting tier. Cameron raised concerns about upfront cost versus phased approach. Requested pricing flexibility to stay competitive with Fathom alternative.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure this with a smaller upfront commitment and scale up quarterly?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore a ramp structure, though per-seat pricing is more favorable at the 34-seat level

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer to close this quarter?
questions_asked.answer: We have some flexibility for deals closing this quarter—let me work with leadership on what we can offer

objections: Fathom came in significantly lower on their quote—we need you to be more competitive
next_steps: Prepare revised pricing with discount options
Follow up with Ethan on final decision-maker alignment

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing negotiation with Ethan Lopez. Presented revised proposal with 26.9% discount to match budget constraints and close the deal this quarter. Ethan confirmed this pricing works and will recommend approval to Harper and Priya. Discussed implementation timeline starting early next quarter.

questions_asked.question: Can you confirm this pricing locks in for our first year?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this is a 12-month commitment with locked pricing, and we can discuss renewal terms at month 10

questions_asked.question: What do you need from us to move to signatures this week?
questions_asked.answer: I'll route the updated proposal to Harper and Priya today. Assuming no issues, we should have signatures by Friday

next_steps: Send final contract with agreed pricing
Schedule kickoff call for following week
